description: MCP-style external tool contract for Desktop/Mac mini/Notebook safe patch orchestration.

nodeRoles.desktop: canonical source owner and final verifier for C:\AbandonWare\demo-1\demo-1\src
nodeRoles.macmini: read-only investigator and PatchDrop patch producer from a separate worktree
nodeRoles.notebook: supporting probe, documentation, and diff-review node

tools.name: source_scan
tools.description: Count active source/resource files, PatchDrop state, secret-pattern hits, and env-name references without returning file contents.

tools.name: harmony_scan
tools.description: Compute a redacted source-backed harmony health snapshot for HB-01 through HB-12, TraceStore key coverage, duplicate FQCNs, cross-subsystem files, and count-only secret hits.

tools.name: agent_db_snapshot
tools.description: Fetch the redacted Agent DB context snapshot from the local Desktop runtime using AWX_ADMIN_TOKEN when present.

tools.name: trace_snapshot_probe
tools.description: Fetch token-safe TraceSnapshotStore availability metadata from the local Desktop runtime using AWX_ADMIN_TOKEN when present; returns counts and hashes only.

tools.name: supabase_context_probe
tools.description: Probe local Supabase CLI presence, MCP config presence, unauthenticated MCP endpoint reachability, and Supabase env-name presence without returning secret values.

tools.name: supabase_schema_snapshot
tools.description: Write a local, redacted Supabase schema snapshot artifact, read-only SQL bundle, MCP execute_sql collection packet, and query-result template from the read-only probe plan; if CLI/MCP auth is unavailable, records evidence_needed without mutating the database.

tools.name: supabase_schema_snapshot_import
tools.description: Import already-run Supabase read-only SQL result JSON, JSONL, named execute_sql transcript exports, JSON-RPC structuredContent, MCP content text JSON, or redacted MCP error transcripts into the local schema snapshot artifact without storing raw rows or mutating the database.

tools.name: patch_plan
tools.description: Convert findings and target files into a minimal Safe Patch plan with role decision and Desktop final-proof gate.

tools.name: patch_render
tools.description: Render the PatchDrop v3 sidecar contract for a candidate patch and scan a provided diff for secret/filemode/forbidden-path blockers.

tools.name: archive_index_build
tools.description: Build a local secret-safe BackupsXS/index.jsonl style archive index artifact from an archive root without restoring or editing source files.

tools.name: archive_search
tools.description: Search BackupsXS/index.jsonl with q, filters, top_k, at least two passes, and evidence_needed on zero results.

tools.name: archive_restore
tools.description: Restore files from an archive root with mode=restore, glob, target_dir, checksum reporting, safe audit-log rows, and optional verify_log checksum evidence.

tools.name: boot_verify
tools.description: Return role-local Gradle verification commands and cache hints; Desktop must run final proof.

tools.name: build_error_mine
tools.description: Mine a build log into stable failure classes without returning raw log content.

tools.name: run_pipeline
tools.description: Probe run_pipeline, the MCP control-tower pipeline runner, verify_boot, and build-error-miner script availability and return exact commands.

tools.name: external_evidence_intake
tools.description: Copy valid PatchDrop external-node-smoke proof JSON into the Desktop evidence directory, then audit node-smoke JSON plus producer PatchDrop v3 sidecars without fabricating missing host proof; when proof completes, nextActions carries the Desktop janitor apply gate while Desktop final proof remains pending.

tools.name: external_evidence_audit
tools.description: Validate Mac mini and Notebook node-smoke JSON plus producer PatchDrop v3 sidecars without returning raw logs or source content; missing or invalid producer proof emits collect-external-evidence-files nextActions naming Desktop evidence paths, PatchDrop proof directory, sidecars, and source-isolation gates; producer bundles are required unless require_producer_bundles=false, archive-index availability is optional unless require_archive_index=true, and complete proof returns a Desktop janitor apply gate in nextActions.

tools.name: producer_command_plan
tools.description: Render exact producer-host commands for node-smoke JSON proof and producer_handoff bundle generation without editing the Desktop canonical source.

tools.name: desktop_dispatch_packet
tools.description: Render both Mac mini and Notebook producer command packets plus Desktop intake/audit commands, optionally writing redacted dispatch artifacts under PatchDrop without editing source or fabricating external proof.

tools.name: producer_kit_export
tools.description: Export a redacted MCP producer kit under PatchDrop so Mac mini and Notebook producer-local worktrees can install runner scripts, schemas, skills, prompts, and setup helpers without writing the Desktop canonical source.

tools.name: desktop_control_loop
tools.description: Run the Desktop-side control loop by combining source_scan, optional dispatch artifact refresh, and external_evidence_audit while keeping Desktop final proof pending until producer smoke, PatchDrop v3 sidecars, and project-scoped Supabase live proof arrive. nextActions may include run-cross-subsystem-contract-tests with focusedTests and requiredTraceKeys, collect-supabase-live-proof with requiredEnv, requiredMcpTools, artifactPaths, and requiredResultNames; completionAuditNextActions may include role-specific proof steps: run_macmini_external_node_smoke, collect_macmini_producer_handoff_json, submit_macmini_patchdrop_v3_bundle_sidecars, run_notebook_external_node_smoke, collect_notebook_producer_handoff_json, submit_notebook_patchdrop_v3_bundle_sidecars.

completionAuditNextActions.description: Completion audit recovery actions. Role-specific external proof actions include run_macmini_external_node_smoke, collect_macmini_producer_handoff_json, submit_macmini_patchdrop_v3_bundle_sidecars, run_notebook_external_node_smoke, collect_notebook_producer_handoff_json, and submit_notebook_patchdrop_v3_bundle_sidecars.

resources.name: tool_manifest
resources.usage: Fixed AWX MCP tool/resource/prompt contract consumed by scripts/awx_mcp_stdio_server.py and scripts/awx_mcp_toolbox.py.

resources.name: mcp_stdio_server
resources.usage: Minimal stdio JSON-RPC bridge exposing tools/list, tools/call, resources/list, resources/read, prompts/list, and prompts/get.

resources.name: mcp_client_config
resources.usage: Secret-free MCP client config sample for Desktop, Mac mini, and Notebook agents; producer nodes must set cwd to a local worktree, not the Desktop canonical source root.

resources.name: archive_index
resources.usage: archive_search uses payload index_path first, then ARCHIVE_INDEX, then NAS_ARCHIVE_ROOT/index.jsonl, then BackupsXS/index.jsonl; q, filters, top_k are required and empty searches expand the query.

resources.name: patchdrop
resources.usage: Mac mini and Notebook submit patch bundles; Desktop promotes, applies, and verifies.

resources.name: node_smoke_runner
resources.usage: Mac mini and Notebook run this from a local worktree/clone to verify MCP tool contracts without writing the Desktop canonical root.

resources.name: mcp_node_setup_runner
resources.usage: Producer nodes run this to render a secret-free MCP client config with cwd pinned to their producer-local worktree and --audit-log set to .codex/awx-control-tower.audit.jsonl; it fail-closes on Desktop canonical roots.

resources.name: producer_handoff_runner
resources.usage: Producer nodes run this after local edits to execute node smoke first, then render a PatchDrop v3 bundle through the producer-local __patch_drop__/producer_bundle.py helper while writing bundle artifacts to the shared PatchDrop root; use --audit-log set to .codex/awx-control-tower.audit.jsonl.

resources.name: completion_audit_runner
resources.usage: Desktop runs this to audit local MCP control-tower requirements while keeping external Mac mini/Notebook proof as evidence_needed.

resources.name: external_evidence_dir
resources.usage: Mac mini and Notebook node-smoke JSON files can be copied here as <role>-node-smoke.json, but Desktop external_evidence_audit also requires matching PatchDrop v3 producer bundle sidecars unless require_producer_bundles=false.

resources.name: producer_kit_dir
resources.usage: Desktop producer_kit_export writes redacted runner/script/schema/skill/prompt kits here; producers install a kit into their own local worktree before running node setup, smoke, and PatchDrop handoff.
